title: ‘Experiment without becoming lazy’- Teacher Story: Ot van Daalen
content:
When does the use of AI add value, and when does it come at the expense of something valuable? In conversation with Ot van Daalen, a lecturer in Information Law and attorney, the TLC-FdR discusses the value of AI. A little sneak peek: experiment! Sometimes with success, sometimes with the conclusion that it isn’t the right path after all.
The post ‘Experiment without becoming lazy’- Teacher Story: Ot van Daalen appeared first on IVIR.

title: UAM Beachvolleyball 2026
content:
Unisport Austria Beach Volleyball Championships 2026: Title deciders in glorious weather and a home victory in Klagenfurt!
From 3 to 4 June 2026, the beach volleyball courts at the University Sports Institute (USI) in Klagenfurt became the centre of academic beach volleyball. After a rather mediocre start in terms of weather on the first day of the tournament, the athletes were rewarded with glorious sunshine and absolutely perfect weather on the final Thursday. The new championship titles were awarded on the sand in front of a fantastic crowd.
An overview of the key results:
Women’s competition: Huge cheers for the hosts! In a thrilling match, the Klagenfurt pair KATZ/ZIELER prevailed and were crowned the deserved tournament winners in front of their home crowd. They defeated the team RIHS/BISANZ in the final after a strong performance and brought the championship title back to Carinthia. Third place went to LINDNER/LACEK.
Men’s competition: In the men’s event, the duo STEINER/LORENTZ celebrated their tournament victory. They relegated the pair ZELENKA/TRAUTH to second place. Bronze went to HOLECEK/LEITNER.
We congratulate all participants on their performances and thank them for a fair, high-quality tournament weekend!
See you next year!
Der Beitrag UAM Beachvolleyball 2026 erschien zuerst auf University of Klagenfurt.
